content.thinking: Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state, then apply the migration rule.

Let me analyze the migration needed: 1. **`title` prop on `` (line 43)**: Move to `` child component 2. **`actions` prop on `` (lines 49-60)**: Move to `` child component (actions become children of ModalFooter) 3. **Import updates**: Add `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` to imports Let me trace through the changes: **Current structure:** ```jsx Close]} > ...

content.text:
Now let me reason through the fix step by step:

1. **`title` prop (line 43)**: Remove from `<Modal>`, move to `<ModalHeader title={source?.name} />` child.
2. **`actions` prop (lines 49-60)**: Remove from `<Modal>`, move the Button into `<ModalFooter>` as a child (not array).
3. **Existing children** (`<Table>...`): Wrap in `<ModalBody>`.
4. **Imports**: Add `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import.

Let me apply these edits:

arguments.after: import { Modal, ModalVariant, ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter, Button, Icon, List, ListItem } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before: import { Modal, ModalVariant, Button, Icon, List, ListItem } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after:
<Modal
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
      isOpen={isOpen}
      onClose={() => {
        setExpanded([]);
        return onClose();
      }}
    >
      <ModalHeader title={source?.name} />
      <ModalBody>
      <Table aria-label={'Connections lists'}>
arguments.before:
<Modal
      variant={ModalVariant.small}
      title={source?.name}
      isOpen={isOpen}
      onClose={() => {
        setExpanded([]);
        return onClose();
      }}
      actions={[
        <Button
          key="cancel"
          variant="secondary"
          onClick={() => {
            setExpanded([]);
            return onClose();
          }}
        >
          Close
        </Button>
      ]}
    >
      <Table aria-label={'Connections lists'}>
